data.title: Farmers & Merchants Bancorp (FMCB) reports record Q2 2025 earnings: net income $23.1 million, EPS $32.94, ROA 1.65%, ROE 15.09%.
data.description: In the second quarter of 2025, Farmers & Merchants Bancorp reported a net income of $23.1 million, which was a 5.9% increase compared to the same quarter in 2024. The diluted earnings per share for the quarter were $32.94, reflecting a 12.1% increase from 2024. Key financial metrics include a return on average assets of 1.65% and a return on average equity of 15.09%. The company maintained a strong liquidity position with $291.8 million in cash and $1.3 billion in investment securities as of June 30, 2025. The efficiency ratio stood at 44.88%, showing continued cost discipline. The Company's regulatory capital ratios, such as the total risk-based capital ratio of 15.35%, indicated a strong capital position. Farmers & Merchants Bancorp has a history of dividend payments for 90 consecutive years and has increased dividends for 60 consecutive years. The company has been ranked by Sure Dividend and Bank Director Magazine for its exceptional performance in the banking sector.CEO Kent Steinwert emphasized the company's strong financial performance, highlighting record net income and robust balance sheet growth. Farmers & Merchants Bancorp's total assets increased to $5.5 billion from $5.4 billion as of December 31, 2024. Loans and leases outstanding were $3.6 billion, and the investment securities portfolio increased to $1.3 billion. Credit quality remained solid with no non-accrual loans and a negligible delinquency ratio. The company's forward-looking statements acknowledged various risks and uncertainties in the economic environment. Overall, Farmers & Merchants Bancorp demonstrated consistent growth and financial stability in the second quarter of 2025.

data.title: Globavend Holdings to undergo 1-for-200 reverse stock split, trading on Nasdaq expected to commence post-split on July 21, 2025.
data.description: On July 17, 2025, Globavend Holdings Limited revealed its plans to implement a 1-for-200 reverse stock split of its ordinary shares. This move by the e-commerce logistics provider is aimed at enhancing its market position. Following the Reverse Stock Split, the company's ordinary shares are expected to commence trading on the Nasdaq Capital Market based on the adjusted value starting July 21, 2025. This strategic decision is anticipated to impact the company's standing and attract potential investors as it seeks to consolidate its share structure for improved trading dynamics.

data.title: GameSquare Holdings, Inc completes $70M public offering, poised to be major Ethereum holder. - PRNewswire 7/17/25
data.description: GameSquare Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ: GAME), a company based in FRISCO, Texas, is set to significantly boost its treasury strategy to become one of the top public holders of Ethereum. This move positions the company as a key player in the industry. The company's aggressive approach reflects its aim to enhance its position in the market.
NBC reports a new U.S. assessment concludes American strikes ‘mostly destroyed’ Iran’s Fordow nuclear facility, with less damage at Natanz and Isfahan sites.

data.title: Veolia acquires Icetec for digital and energy expansion in North America. Icetec has 20+ years in energy management.
data.description: Veolia, a prominent environmental services provider, has successfully acquired Icetec, a digital and distributed energy management company from Pennsylvania. With over 20 years of experience, Icetec specializes in delivering quantified energy savings and operational enhancements for clients. This strategic acquisition will enhance Veolia’s energy service portfolio in North America, offering additional capabilities to the company.

data.title: Fusion Fuel and Houpu Global Clean Energy partnership to expand hydrogen infrastructure in Europe and Latin America; BrightHy Solutions signs agreement.
data.description: In Dublin on July 17, 2025, Fusion Fuel Green PLC's hydrogen advisory and solutions subsidiary, Bright Hydrogen Solutions Ltd, has entered an agency agreement with Houpu Global Clean Energy Co., Ltd. This agreement involves a leading Chinese manufacturer of hydrogen refueling equipment and clean energy technologies. Fusion Fuel Green PLC (NASDAQ: HTOO) facilitated this deal, emphasizing the growing collaboration within the hydrogen sector. Bright Hydrogen Solutions Ltd's partnership with Houpu Global Clean Energy signifies a strategic leap towards sustainable energy solutions. This collaboration aims to leverage Houpu Global Clean Energy's expertise in hydrogen refueling equipment to advance clean energy technologies.

data.title: Eukanuba and Canine Companions celebrate 50 years of service dogs with specialized dog food support.
data.description: For more than three decades, Eukanuba has backed Canine Companions by providing premium dog food designed specifically for service dogs' distinct requirements. In St. Louis, on July 17, 2025, marking 50 years since the inception of the modern service dog concept, Eukanuba stands as a leader in this initiative.

data.title: FLX Networks names Ryland Pruett as MD, focuses on enterprise sales to boost growth. Bernardsville, N.J, July 17, 2025.
data.description: A seasoned professional with extensive experience in enterprise sales has joined FLX Networks to drive the growth and utilization of their Solutions Exchange in BERNARDSVILLE, N.J. The announcement was made on July 17, 2025. FLX Networks, known for its innovative solutions, is focused on revolutionizing the connectivity for asset and wealth management companies. This move aims to leverage the new hire's expertise to propel the company's expansion and increase adoption rates.

data.title: Tourism Fiji launches global campaign for 25th anniversary of Cast Away, showcasing Wilson's journey in Fiji after 25 years.
data.description: A touching new movie depicts Wilson's adventure 25 years later in Fiji, a place known for its inherent joy. NADI, Fiji, July 17, 2025 - Tourism Fiji introduces an exciting global campaign celebrating the 25th anniversary of the film Cast.

data.title: "New feature from Flo Health to empower 1 billion+ perimenopausal women lacking support. July 17, 2025."
data.description: A recently introduced feature by Flo Health is set to enhance health education for women in a life stage that has historically lacked attention. In London on July 17, 2025, Flo Health, the leading women's health app globally, with a user base exceeding 420 million, disclosed the introduction of the "Flo..." feature.

data.title: BioBond partners with All in One to improve homeless services facility in Lafayette, Ind. with antimicrobial coatings.
data.description: BioBond Adhesives, Inc. ("BioBond"), a leading provider of biobased coatings, has teamed up with All in One Professional Services from Lafayette, Indiana to improve the LTHC Homeless Services Facility. This collaboration, announced on July 17, 2025, aims to enhance the facility's amenities and support services. Lafayette-based All in One brings its expertise in managing such projects, while BioBond contributes its innovative solutions. The partnership signifies a significant step towards improving services for the homeless population in LAFAYETTE, with potential impacts on (mention any relevant figures such as number of beneficiaries or project costs if available).

data.title: Zimperium warns of increasing mobile cyber threats as summer travel rises, 5M unsecured Wi-Fi networks detected in 2025.
data.description: In 2025, over 5 million unsecured public Wi-Fi networks have been identified, with a concerning statistic showing that 33% of users continue to connect to these networks despite the associated risks. The warning comes from Zimperium, a leading mobile security company, as the summer travel season sees a significant increase in activity. The trend highlights the escalating threats faced by mobile users in terms of cyber security.

data.title: Chris McMahon of MFA Wealth named #61 nationally, #2 in Pennsylvania, Forbes' 2025 Top Financial Security Professionals.
data.description: In Pittsburgh on July 17, 2025, Chris McMahon, the Founder and CEO of MFA Wealth, has achieved recognition by being included in Forbes' 2025 list of Top Financial Security Professionals. McMahon secured the 61st position nationwide and is ranked as the 2nd top professional in Pennsylvania. This notable achievement was revealed in the July 2025 publication of rankings by SHOOK Research.

data.title: Hot Tomato Summer is back in Richmond, VA on July 17, 2025 with new flavors, a new city, and more mayo.
data.description: Launching on July 17 in Richmond, Virginia, Hot Tomato Summer is back for another exciting season. Duke's Mayo is set to commemorate everyone's favorite summer duo. This year promises to be even grander with bigger and bolder festivities. Catch all the action starting on July 17, 2025.

data.title: Wrangler® partners with STATE Bags for back-to-school line, targeting next-gen trailblazers.
data.description: In Greensboro, North Carolina, Wrangler® and STATE Bags have teamed up for an exciting collaboration aimed at the next wave of pioneers. This partnership comes at the perfect moment for the back-to-school period.

data.title: Divert and USCS partner to convert unsellable food & drinks into renewable energy and soil amendment.
data.description: A collaboration between Divert and USCS has been established in West Concord, Mass and Camden, N.J. The partnership aims to launch a recycling initiative converting food and beverage items into renewable energy and soil amendment. This program is anticipated to significantly reduce waste production, with an estimated diversion of 50,000 tons of materials annually. By utilizing innovative recycling techniques, the project will contribute to sustainability efforts and help limit environmental impact in the regions involved.

data.title: Fortune Brands will announce Q2 2025 financial results on July 31, 2025, with CEO Nicholas Fink leading the conference call.
data.description: Fortune Brands Innovations, Inc., a top home, security, and digital products firm trading as NYSE: FBIN, is set to announce its financial results for the second quarter of 2025 after the market closes on Thursday, July 31, 2025. The CEO Nicholas Fink, CFO Jon Baksht, and VP of Finance will host a conference at 5:00 p.m. ET to discuss the results. The company aims to enhance lives by creating safe and uplifting living environments.
